DB.description: D1 database for app data and notification jobs.

ASSETS_BUCKET.description: Private R2 bucket for uploaded logos and icons.

scripts.build:docker: pnpm run build:client && pnpm run sync:static && pnpm run build:server
scripts.sync:static: mkdir -p packages/server/internal/static/public && find packages/server/internal/static/public -mindepth 1 ! -name .gitkeep -delete && cp -R packages/client/dist/. packages/server/internal/static/public/
scripts.check:website: pnpm --filter @renewlet/website lint && pnpm --filter @renewlet/website test && pnpm --filter @renewlet/website build
scripts.check:cloudflare: pnpm check:media-resolver-config && pnpm check:ai-recognition-prompt && pnpm check:built-in-config-labels && pnpm check:server-i18n && pnpm --filter @renewlet/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @renewlet/cloudflare typecheck && pnpm --filter @renewlet/cloudflare test:run && VITE_RENEWLET_RUNTIME=cloudflare pnpm --filter @renewlet/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @renewlet/client typecheck:all
scripts.dev:cloudflare: pnpm build:cloudflare && node scripts/prepare-cloudflare-local-headers.mjs && pnpm cloudflare:migrations:apply:local && node scripts/cloudflare-dev-hint.mjs && wrangler dev --test-scheduled
scripts.cloudflare:migrations:apply:local: CI=1 wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.test:all: pnpm check:file-lines && pnpm check:deploy && pnpm --filter @renewlet/client test:run && pnpm typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/server test && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @renewlet/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @renewlet/client typecheck:all && pnpm typecheck:e2e
